_note: Reference photos in reference/site-2/. Site 2 is at 411 Homestead St.

scene.description: A photorealistic wide daytime exterior of a 1500 square foot neglected residential common-space entry area at 411 Homestead Street in Anna's Farm subdivision, Lafayette Colorado. Overgrown plot with bare brown soil, dead grass, scattered small ornamental trees and shrubs in poor condition, a couple existing boulders (one white-gray, one reddish), an antique metal farm implement (plow or cultivator) as decoration, wooden split-rail fence along the back boundary. Townhomes with colored siding on the right side. Open prairie field with a windmill visible behind the fence. Concrete sidewalk and curb along the front. Colorado Front Range suburban neighborhood, early spring, trees still bare.
scene.weather: partly cloudy Colorado sky, big cumulus clouds, blue sky
scene.season: early spring, trees bare, brown dormant grass
